title: Conflict Resolution & Consensus
learning_outcomes: Explain multi-agent debate structures and consensus rules.

content_sections.title: Multi-Agent Debate and Consensus
content_sections.content:
When agents output conflicting results (e.g. two analysts draw different conclusions from a dataset), the system applies **consensus rules**:

1.  **Voting Consensus:** Multiple agents evaluate the proposals, and the option with the most votes is selected.
2.  **Debate Structures:** Agents exchange arguments in a multi-turn conversation, modifying their positions until a consensus is reached or a maximum number of turns is exceeded.
